SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.model.mode

Class LevelMode

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.model.mode.LevelMode
public class LevelMode extends Object
Level configuration data with theme, difficulty, scoring targets, and player progress (Value Object). Defines rules and objectives for a specific level instance with star-based rating (1-3 stars).

  • Constructor Details

    • LevelMode

      public LevelMode(int levelId, String levelName, LevelTheme theme, int fallSpeed, int targetLines, int timeLimitSeconds, int baseTargetScore, int twoStarScore, int threeStarScore, int threeStarTime)
      Constructs a LevelMode configuration.
      Parameters:
      levelId - Level identifier (1-based)
      levelName - Display name
      theme - Level theme
      fallSpeed - Fall speed in ms
      targetLines - Lines to clear
      timeLimitSeconds - time limit in seconds
      baseTargetScore - minimum score for 1 star
      twoStarScore - score needed for 2 stars
      threeStarScore - score needed for 3 stars
      threeStarTime - time in seconds for 3-star rating (time-based)

  • Method Details

    • getLevelId

      public int getLevelId()
      Gets the unique level identifier.
      Returns:
      the 1-based level ID

    • getLevelName

      public String getLevelName()
      Gets the display name of this level.
      Returns:
      the level name

    • getTheme

      public LevelTheme getTheme()
      Gets the theme associated with this level.
      Returns:
      the LevelTheme instance

    • getFallSpeed

      public int getFallSpeed()
      Gets the fall speed for this level in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      the fall speed

    • getTargetLines

      public int getTargetLines()
      Gets the target number of lines to clear.
      Returns:
      the target lines

    • getTimeLimitSeconds

      public int getTimeLimitSeconds()
      Gets the time limit for this level in seconds.
      Returns:
      the time limit

    • getTimeLimitMillis

      public long getTimeLimitMillis()
      Gets the time limit for this level in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      the time limit in milliseconds

    • getBaseTargetScore

      public int getBaseTargetScore()
      Gets the base target score needed to earn 1 star.
      Returns:
      the base target score

    • getTwoStarScore

      public int getTwoStarScore()
      Gets the score needed to earn 2 stars.
      Returns:
      the 2-star score threshold

    • getThreeStarScore

      public int getThreeStarScore()
      Gets the score needed to earn 3 stars.
      Returns:
      the 3-star score threshold

    • getThreeStarTime

      public int getThreeStarTime()
      Gets the time (in seconds) needed to earn 3 stars based on speed.
      Returns:
      the 3-star time threshold

    • isUnlocked

      public boolean isUnlocked()
      Checks if this level is unlocked for play.
      Returns:
      true if unlocked, false otherwise

    • getBestStars

      public int getBestStars()
      Gets the highest star rating achieved for this level.
      Returns:
      the best star rating (0-3)

    • getBestScore

      public int getBestScore()
      Gets the highest score achieved for this level.
      Returns:
      the best score

    • getBestTime

      public long getBestTime()
      Gets the best completion time for this level.
      Returns:
      the best time in milliseconds, or Long.MAX_VALUE if not completed

    • isCompleted

      public boolean isCompleted()
      Checks if this level has been completed (earned at least 1 star).
      Returns:
      true if completed, false otherwise

    • unlock

      public void unlock()
      Unlocks this level.

    • lock

      public void lock()
      Locks this level.

    • updateBest

      public boolean[] updateBest(int score, int stars, long timeMillis)
      Updates the best score and time if new records are set.
      Parameters:
      score - the score achieved
      stars - the number of stars earned
      timeMillis - the completion time in milliseconds
      Returns:
      an array of two booleans: [isNewBestScore, isNewBestTime]

    • resetBest

      public void resetBest()
      Resets all best records to initial state. Used when resetting progress.

    • calculateStars

      public int calculateStars(int score, int linesCleared, int completionTimeSeconds, boolean success)
      Calculates the number of stars earned based on performance. This method should be called after a level is completed.
      Parameters:
      score - final score
      linesCleared - number of lines cleared
      completionTimeSeconds - completion time in seconds
      success - whether the level was completed successfully (met target lines within time)
      Returns:
      number of stars (0-3)

    • getDifficulty

      public String getDifficulty()
      Gets a difficulty rating string based on fall speed.
      Returns:
      difficulty rating (e.g., "Easy", "Medium", "Hard")

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
